accounts.name: user
docs: Borrower signing the debt-increase request.

accounts.name: position
docs: Cushion obligation wrapper linked to the position NFT.

accounts.name: borrow_reserve_liquidity_mint
docs: SPL mint of the reserve liquidity being borrowed.

accounts.name: reserve_source_liquidity
docs: Reserve liquidity vault that sends tokens out during the borrow CPI.

accounts.name: borrow_reserve_liquidity_fee_receiver
docs: Fee receiver configured by the Kamino reserve for borrow fees.

accounts.name: position_borrow_account
docs: Temporary PDA-owned token account that receives the borrowed liquidity first.

accounts.name: user_destination_liquidity
docs: User ATA that receives liquidity after the PDA-to-user transfer.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program used both by Kamino CPI and the final user transfer.

accounts.name: collection
docs: NFT keypair for the collection — account doesn't exist yet

accounts.name: position_registry
docs: Registry PDA acts as update_authority for the collection

accounts.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT keypair — account doesn't exist yet, will be created in this instruction

accounts.name: collection
docs: Cushion collection in which we are minting

accounts.name: cushion_vault
docs: Cushion vault providing the liquidity to the obligation

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account that provides liquidity

accounts.name: position_collateral_account
docs: Program PDA token account (position authority ATA) that temporarily holds tokens

accounts.name: klend_obligation
docs: Kamino obligation (CHECKED via owner)

accounts.name: klend_reserve
docs: Kamino reserve account

accounts.name: reserve_liquidity_supply
docs: Kamino reserve liquidity supply

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program associated with the token used as a collateral

accounts.name: klend_program
docs: Kamino LB program

accounts.name: farms_program
docs: Farms program

accounts.name: lending_market
docs: Kamino CPI needed accounts

accounts.name: dummy
docs: is read or written and the account is not trusted for authorization.

accounts.name: dummy
docs: is read or written and the account is not trusted for authorization.

accounts.name: user
docs: NFT owner signing the repay request; tokens are pulled from their ATA.

accounts.name: position
docs: Cushion obligation wrapper linked to the position NFT.

accounts.name: repay_reserve_liquidity_mint
docs: SPL mint of the reserve liquidity being repaid.

accounts.name: reserve_destination_liquidity
docs: Reserve liquidity vault that receives repaid tokens.

accounts.name: user_source_liquidity
docs: User ATA holding the debt tokens to repay.

accounts.name: position_repay_account
docs: Position's ATA (owned by position_authority) used as staging for the Kamino repay CPI.

accounts.name: token_program
docs: SPL token program used by Kamino CPI.

accounts.name: cushion_vault
docs: Cushion vault providing the liquidity to the obligation

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account that provides liquidity

errors.name: ZeroCollateralAmount
errors.msg: Collateral amount can't be zero when creating the position

errors.name: ZeroRepayAmount
errors.msg: Amount for repaying can't be zero

errors.name: UnsafePosition
errors.msg: Position is too close to liquidation and cannot be insured

errors.name: DepositTooSmall
errors.msg: Deposit amount is below vault minimum

errors.name: ZeroSharesOut
errors.msg: Share output rounded down to zero

errors.name: ZeroAssetsOut
errors.msg: Asset output rounded down to zero

errors.name: InsufficientVaultLiquidity
errors.msg: Vault does not have enough idle liquidity

errors.name: InsufficientRepayLiquidity
errors.msg: Insufficient liquidity in user's source account

errors.name: StalePythPrice
errors.msg: Pyth price is stale or unavailable

errors.name: InvalidPythPrice
errors.msg: Pyth price is negative or zero

errors.name: MinSharesOutNotMet
errors.msg: Slippage: min shares out not met

errors.name: MinAssetsOutNotMet
errors.msg: Slippage: min assets out not met

errors.name: InvalidKaminoLendingMarketAuthority
errors.msg: Invalid Kamino lending market authority PDA

errors.name: InvalidKaminoFarmUserState
errors.msg: Invalid Kamino farm user state PDA

errors.name: InvalidPositionNftMint
errors.msg: Invalid NFT token account mint for Cushion position

errors.name: InvalidPositionNftOwner
errors.msg: NFT token account owner must match signer

errors.name: ReserveAlreadyUsedOnOtherSide
errors.msg: Reserve is already used as a borrow on this obligation

errors.name: MissingKaminoRefreshReserve
errors.msg: A required Kamino reserve account is missing from remaining accounts

errors.name: InjectedCollateral
errors.msg: Position has injected collateral and cannot be decreased

errors.name: MarketValueError
errors.msg: Failed to compute market value from reserve data

errors.name: UnsafeDecreaseCollateral
errors.msg: Collateral decrease would put position below safe LTV threshold

errors.name: NotUnsafePosition
errors.msg: Position is not unsafe, injection failed

errors.name: ZeroPrice
errors.msg: Price of the asset in vault is zero

errors.name: InsuringThresholdError
errors.msg: Computation of insuring LTV threshold failed

errors.name: NotInjected
errors.msg: Position doesn't have any injected collateral

errors.name: WithdrawingThresholdError
errors.msg: Computation of withdrawing LTV threshold failed

errors.name: NotYetSafePosition
errors.msg: Position is not safe enough, withdrawal failed

errors.name: WithdrawAmountCalculationError
errors.msg: Computation of amount to withdraw failed

types.name: Obligation
docs: Wrapper account that references a Kamino obligation managed by a Cushion position.
This account does NOT store lending state
It only references an existing Kamino obligation account
Security invariants:
- `owner` MUST match the owner inside the underlying Kamino obligation

fields.name: nft_mint
docs: NFT mint that deterministically identifies this Cushion position.

fields.name: position_authority
docs: Cushion position authority PDA used for CPI signing.

fields.name: owner
docs: Owner of this wrapper is also the owner of the underlying Kamino obligation.

fields.name: borrower
docs: Borrower associated with the Cushion position.

fields.name: protocol_obligation
docs: Address of the underlying Kamino obligation account.

fields.name: protocol_user_metadata
docs: Kamino user metadata PDA linked to the position authority PDA.

fields.name: collateral_vault
docs: Vault that injects additional collateral

fields.name: injected_amount
docs: amount of tokens injected into the obligation

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for PDA signing

fields.name: injected
docs: Flag whether it is injected additional collateral

types.name: PositionRegistry
docs: Global position registry PDA.
This account is only an on-chain aggregator/index root.
It is NOT an authority for position actions.

types.name: PositionRegistryEntry
docs: Per-position registry entry, keyed by NFT mint.
This mirrors key references for indexing and discovery.
Source of truth for authority remains the NFT/ATA ownership checks
and the `position` PDA.

fields.name: feed_id
docs: `FeedId` but avoid the type alias because of compatibility issues with Anchor's `idl-build` feature.

fields.name: publish_time
docs: The timestamp of this price update in seconds

fields.name: prev_publish_time
docs: The timestamp of the previous price update. This field is intended to allow users to
identify the single unique price update for any moment in time:
for any time t, the unique update is the one such that prev_publish_time < t <= publish_time.
Note that there may not be such an update while we are migrating to the new message-sending logic,
as some price updates on pythnet may not be sent to other chains (because the message-sending
logic may not have triggered). We can solve this problem by making the message-sending mandatory
(which we can do once publishers have migrated over).
Additionally, this field may be equal to publish_time if the message is sent on a slot where
where the aggregation was unsuccesful. This problem will go away once all publishers have
migrated over to a recent version of pyth-agent.

types.name: PriceUpdateV2
docs: A price update account. This account is used by the Pyth Receiver program to store a verified price update from a Pyth price feed.
It contains:
- `write_authority`: The write authority for this account. This authority can close this account to reclaim rent or update the account to contain a different price update.
- `verification_level`: The [`VerificationLevel`] of this price update. This represents how many Wormhole guardian signatures have been verified for this price update.
- `price_message`: The actual price update.
- `posted_slot`: The slot at which this price update was posted.

types.name: Vault
docs: On-chain state for a single Cushion vault that tracks mint relationships,
accounting parameters, and aggregate managed assets.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump used for signing.

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority allowed to manage vault parameters.

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Underlying SPL token mint held by the vault.

fields.name: share_mint
docs: Mint for vault shares.

fields.name: vault_token_account
docs: Token account holding idle underlying assets.

fields.name: treasury_token_account
docs: Treasury token account (reserved for future fee logic).

fields.name: total_managed_assets
docs: Source of truth for total assets economically managed by the vault.

fields.name: min_deposit
docs: Minimum accepted deposit amount.

fields.name: deposit_cap
docs: Hard cap for total managed assets.

fields.name: virtual_assets
docs: Virtual assets used in share conversion.

fields.name: virtual_shares
docs: Virtual shares used in share conversion.

fields.name: market_price
docs: Price of the underlying asset.

fields.name: market_price_last_updated
docs: Last timestamp when the market price was updated.

fields.name: interest_last_updated
docs: Last timestamp when the accumulated interest was updated.

fields.name: accumulated_interest
docs: Accumulated interest of the vault.

fields.name: interest_rate
docs: Interest rate of the vault.

types.name: VaultDepositEvent
docs: Emitted when a user deposits assets and receives freshly minted vault
shares.

types.name: VaultInitializedEvent
docs: Emitted when a new vault is initialized for an underlying asset mint.

types.name: VaultMintEvent
docs: Emitted when a user mints an exact amount of shares and transfers the
required underlying assets into the vault.

types.name: VaultRedeemEvent
docs: Emitted when a user redeems shares for underlying assets withdrawn from the
vault.

types.name: VaultWithdrawEvent
docs: Emitted when a user withdraws an exact amount of assets and burns the
necessary vault shares.

types.name: VerificationLevel
docs: Pyth price updates are bridged to all blockchains via Wormhole.
Using the price updates on another chain requires verifying the signatures of the Wormhole guardians.
The usual process is to check the signatures for two thirds of the total number of guardians, but this can be cumbersome on Solana because of the transaction size limits,
so we also allow for partial verification.
This enum represents how much a price update has been verified:
- If `Full`, we have verified the signatures for two thirds of the current guardians.
- If `Partial`, only `num_signatures` guardian signatures have been checked.
# Warning
Using partially verified price updates is dangerous, as it lowers the threshold of guardians that need to collude to produce a malicious price update.
